source_pr.title: ddl: fix data race and goroutine leak in test
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: disksing <i@disksing.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #31875

Problem Summary: ddl test sometimes failed due to client-go data race

### What is changed and how it works?

- add `TestMain` and move `EnableFailpoint` into it (this step should fix the issue)
- fix goroutine leaks

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->
- [x] Unit test

### Release note
```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: ddl: fix data race and goroutine leak in test.
